message:
chore: add fwc tokio exception + fix jq pipeline in tokio guard script

Add a tokio exception entry for the fwc crate (expires 2026-03-21)
covering the CLI stdio/runtime seam that still depends on Tokio
pending the main.rs and transport cutover.

Fix the asupersync_tokio_guard.sh jq pipeline: the exception-filter
expression was missing the `| $dep` identity step after `as`, causing
the downstream select to operate on the wrong value.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -65,6 +65,14 @@
       "expires_on": "2026-03-21T00:00:00Z",
       "reason": "Host runtime migration not complete"
     },
+    {
+      "crate": "fwc",
+      "dependency": "tokio",
+      "kind": "normal",
+      "owner_bead": "flywheel_connectors-1ud0u.4",
+      "expires_on": "2026-03-21T00:00:00Z",
+      "reason": "CLI stdio/runtime seam still depends on Tokio pending main.rs and transport cutover"
+    },
     {
       "crate": "fcp-oauth",
       "dependency": "tokio",

@@ -121,6 +121,7 @@ jq --argjson now "${NOW_EPOCH}" '
 jq --slurpfile exceptions "${ACTIVE_DEP_EXCEPTIONS_JSON}" '
     [
       .[] as $dep
+      | $dep
       | select(
           (
             [
